item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.

item.title: 👎💵Carolyn Logue - Associated Builders & Contractors Inland Pacific Chapter
item.description: Carolyn Logue signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Associated Builders & Contractors Inland Pacific Chapter. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Jerry VanderWood - Associated General Contractors (AGC)
item.description: Jerry VanderWood signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Associated General Contractors (AGC).

item.title: 👍Chris Ellis - Bricklayers and Allied Craftworkers Local 1
item.description: Chris Ellis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Bricklayers and Allied Craftworkers Local 1.

item.title: 👍💵Heather Kurtenbach - Washington State Building & Construction Trades Council
item.description: Heather Kurtenbach signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Building & Construction Trades Council. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Neil Hartman - Washington State Association of UA Plumbers, Pipefitters and HVAC/R Service Technicians
item.description: Neil Hartman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of UA Plumbers, Pipefitters and HVAC/R Service Technicians. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Susan Bittner - President/CEO of Fryer-Knowles Flooring
item.description: Susan Bittner signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent President/CEO of Fryer-Knowles Flooring.

item.title: ❓Tammy Fellin - Department of Labor & Industries
item.description: Tammy Fellin signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Labor & Industries.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
